mainEntity.name: What is the penalty for late ROC filing in Bangalore?

acceptedAnswer.text: Late filing attracts additional fees of Rs 100 per day per form with no upper cap. For AOC-4 and MGT-7 combined, the penalty can exceed Rs 73,000 per year. Directors may also face personal liability for non-compliance.

mainEntity.name: What forms are required for annual ROC compliance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Mandatory annual forms: AOC-4 (financial statements, due within 30 days of AGM), MGT-7/MGT-7A (annual return, due within 60 days of AGM), and DIR-3 KYC (director KYC, due 30 September annually). Additional event-based forms may apply.

mainEntity.name: Can you handle overdue ROC filings from previous years?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. We handle compliance catch-up including filing of all overdue AOC-4 and MGT-7 forms, payment of additional fees, and condonation of delay applications with MCA where applicable.
